description: Settings tab cycling (ported to testCases schema 2026-06-05). Cycles all 4 Settings tabs (General, Account, Manual Scan, Background) via the verified 'Tab N of 4' selectors, then returns home. Account-scoped: enters Settings via the Select-Account dialog. Action-only: clicking each tab resolves only if the tab is present. Read-only: no toggles touched. Verified against live UI 2026-06-05.

testCases.title: Cycle all 4 Settings tabs and return home
